description_long: This is a two-story house with a steeply pitched gable roof partially covered in snow, evoking a winter or holiday setting. The front facade features a prominent triangular pediment, decorative trim, and symmetrical windows adorned with wreaths, suggesting a festive atmosphere. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal siding with blue trim around the windows and doors, and the house is accented by red and green holiday decorations. The main entrance is centered, accessed by a small set of steps, and flanked by columns supporting a covered porch. The sides and rear of the house display additional windows, some with yellow panes, and the landscaping includes small bushes and snow drifts at the base. The overall design is reminiscent of a classic Victorian or Colonial Revival home, with ornate details and a cozy, inviting appearance.
description: A festive, two-story house with a gable roof, decorative trim, and holiday wreaths on the windows, featuring a covered porch and snow accents. The exterior is detailed with blue trim, symmetrical windows, and classic architectural elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, symmetrical windows with wreaths, and a prominent gable roof with snow.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, additional windows, a secondary door, and more snow on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with two large windows, less decorative detail, and visible landscaping at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more windows, snow-covered roof, and prominent bushes at the base.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with steps, covered porch, columns, and decorative holiday wreaths
